calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Continued To Feb-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Espey for Marilyn Norman.

Ms. Espey explained that title was held as "unmarried persons as tenants in common", that a mortgage was obtained in 1992 that changed the title to "married people as tenants in common", and that during the marriage assets were co-mingled and bank accounts were held jointly. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to February 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Espey to file a supplement providing authority regarding the issue of community property. Said supplement is to be filed by February 17, 2017.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Continued To Jan-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Olson (son of petitioner) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Olson stated that he is here to represent his mother (Marilyn Norman) and that he is not an attorney. The Court let Mr. Olson know that he cannot represent his mother, that she has not filed a proof of service and that the son of the decedent needs to be served. Mr. Olson confirmed that it is a son from a previous marriage. The Court stated that this has been on calendar two times for the same reasons, that the petition must be served on the son of the decedent, that the proof of service must be filed and that a proposed order must be provided to the Court. Mr. Olson stated that he will inform his mother and give her the new date. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to January 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
